creator_profile.name: Alex Hormozi
main_platforms: Podcast (The Game w/ Alex Hormozi on Spotify)

audience_size_documented.TikTok: [uncertain] Estimated multi-million; exact figure not confirmed from primary source
audience_size_documented.cross_platform_note: Reported 4.5M new subscribers and 3B impressions across platforms in 12-month period leading to Aug 2025 book launch

creator_profile.tier_justification: Multi-platform mainstream recognition with millions of followers across YouTube (3.87M), Instagram (5M), X (960K). Co-founder of Skool.com. Managing Partner of Acquisition.com portfolio reportedly doing $200M+/yr. $100M Money Models book launch generated ~$87M+ in single-day sales and broke the Guinness World Record for fastest-selling non-fiction book (2.9M copies in one day, Aug 16, 2025). Consistent multi-platform content creator with 250+ pieces of content per week.

bot_identity.positioning_tagline: Alex Hormozi's brain, in your pocket. A personal AI business advisor trained on proven strategies for scaling to $100M+.
positioning_narrative_excerpts: A Custom AI that's like having his entire team & all his private data, at your fingertips, 24/7.

Unlike other AI tools that give you information, ACQ AI gives you implementation. It contains more exclusive business data & hands-on implementation experience than most people see in their entire careers.
Trained on $31,000,000 in consulting work across 1,026+ businesses. This data has never been in any book.
bot_identity.launch_date: 2025-08 (bundled with $100M Money Models book launch on August 16, 2025; also available standalone via shop.acquisition.com)

primary_jtbds: ask_my_method - Ask business questions and get answers grounded in Hormozi's frameworks ($100M Offers, Leads, Models)
course_teaching_assistant - Implementation guidance from playbooks and consulting data
pre_sale_education - Cold call scripts, objection handling, pricing models, sales funnels
paid_tier_unlock - Premium AI access behind $3K initiation + $299/mo paywall
secondary_jtbds: lead_qualification - Offer design and constraint analysis for business scaling
community_help - Integrated into ACQ Vantage founders community as member resource
jobs_to_be_done.jtbd_evidence_source: Stated (from official marketing copy on shop.acquisition.com and launch materials)

functionality.tool_integrations: [uncertain] No specific third-party integrations publicly documented. ACQ AI appears to operate as a standalone chat interface within the acquisition.com ecosystem. It is also available as a member resource within the ACQ Vantage community on Skool.
functionality.knowledge_grounding_claimed: Trained on $31M in consulting work across 1,026+ businesses, all three Hormozi books ($100M Offers, $100M Leads, $100M Money Models), 12 implementation playbooks, notes and data from 226+ private one-on-one business consultations, and 50,000+ hours of consulting (per ACQ Vantage marketing). Includes constraint analyses, diagnostic sessions, offer designs, and funnel optimization strategies.
functionality.moderation_disclaimers: Terms & Conditions page exists at ai.acquisition.com/terms-conditions. Content described as 'for informational purposes only.' Acquisition.com states it does not take responsibility for interruptions, delays, or unavailability of site content.
functionality.human_handoff: [uncertain] Not publicly documented. ACQ Vantage VIP tier ($3K/mo) includes direct access to advisory team, but unclear if ACQ AI itself escalates to humans.
functionality.platform_infrastructure: [uncertain] Described as a 'Custom AI' — underlying LLM provider not publicly disclosed. Hosted at ai.acquisition.com. Not a GPT Store product (separate unofficial clones exist on ChatGPT). Likely a custom-built RAG application, but specific technology stack (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.) is not confirmed.
functionality.voice_modality_details: No voice modality documented. ACQ AI appears to be text-only. No evidence of voice cloning or audio interaction.
functionality.ai_agent_capabilities: Primarily an advisory/Q&A chatbot that generates implementation-ready outputs: cold call scripts, objection handling guides, voicemail/SMS follow-up templates, proposal emails, pricing models, offer designs with SLAs, and full sales funnels. No documented autonomous action-taking capabilities (no booking, CRM integration, or workflow execution).

distribution.distribution_path_description: Social media (YouTube, IG, X, TikTok) -> link in bio / acquisition.com -> book launch registration page or shop.acquisition.com/pages/acq-ai -> purchase ACQ AI standalone ($3K + $299/mo) OR purchase $100M Money Models bundle ($5,998 for book + playbooks + ACQ AI + workshop). Also distributed through ACQ Vantage community on Skool as a member benefit.
distribution.link_in_bio_platform: Custom (acquisition.com). Instagram bio links to acquisition.com. Also uses register.acq.com for book launch funnels.
distribution.social_to_bot_funnel: YouTube videos and shorts -> description links to acquisition.com; Instagram @hormozi -> bio link to acquisition.com with CTA 'Get your free scaling roadmap'; X/Twitter @AlexHormozi -> pinned posts and links to acquisition.com; Podcast (The Game) -> mentions and links to acquisition.com resources. Book launch specifically used 'link in bio or register.acq.com' CTA across all platforms.

monetization.pricing_model: paid (standalone subscription) and bundled_with_course (as part of $100M Money Models bundle)
monetization.public_price: $3,000 initiation fee + $299/month after first 30 days (standalone). $5,998 for the $100M Money Models bundle (book + 12 playbooks + ACQ AI + live workshop). $18,000 one-time advisory upsell also offered during book launch.
monetization.bundled_with: $100M Money Models book bundle ($5,998), ACQ Vantage founders community (Premium at $8,000/year, VIP at $3,000/month)
monetization.monetization_linkage_type: direct_subscription (standalone ACQ AI), course_retention (bundled with book/playbooks to increase perceived value), community_value_add (included in ACQ Vantage membership), upsell_to_1on1 ($18K advisory upsell during launch)
monetization.list_building_integration: Book launch registration at register.acq.com captures email/contact info. ACQ Vantage community on Skool serves as ongoing engagement and retention channel.

revenue_model_detail.book_bundle: $5,998 one-time for $100M Money Models + 12 playbooks + ACQ AI access + live workshop
revenue_model_detail.book_launch_revenue: ~$87M in single-day revenue on Aug 16, 2025. Estimated 10,000+ customers at $6K bundle + meaningful take-rate on $18K upsell. Total launch weekend reportedly exceeded $100M.
revenue_model_detail.estimated_annual_ai_revenue: [uncertain] Not separately disclosed. AI product revenue is commingled with book/community/advisory revenue streams.

content_training.content_training_corpus: Three books ($100M Offers, $100M Leads, $100M Money Models), 12 implementation playbooks, $31M worth of consulting data across 1,026+ businesses, 226+ private one-on-one business consultation notes, 50,000+ hours of consulting work, constraint analyses, diagnostic sessions, offer designs, and funnel optimization strategies. Also includes unpublished SOPs (per ACQ Vantage marketing).
content_training.update_frequency: [uncertain] Not publicly documented. Marketing references '2 years of consulting' data as of ACQ Vantage launch, suggesting periodic updates, but no explicit refresh cadence stated.

risks_guardrails.stated_disclaimers: Content is 'for informational purposes only.' Acquisition.com does not take responsibility for interruptions, delays, or unavailability of site content. Terms & Conditions available at ai.acquisition.com/terms-conditions.
risks_guardrails.data_use_policy_cited: Acquisition Privacy Policy referenced in Terms & Conditions. Acquisition.com states it does not sell personal information to other companies. Users can withdraw consent at any time. Consent is not a condition of any purchase.
risks_guardrails.minors_policy: [uncertain] Not specifically documented in publicly available search results.
risks_guardrails.impersonation_safeguards: [uncertain] Not specifically documented. Marketing explicitly positions ACQ AI as 'what Alex would do in your business' which blurs the line between AI advisor and personal advice from Alex Hormozi himself.
risks_guardrails.regulatory_compliance_status: [uncertain] No public statements found regarding FTC disclosure requirements, state AI laws, or professional impersonation safeguards specific to ACQ AI.

competitive.competitive_moat_type: Proprietary methodology ($100M framework across Offers/Leads/Models), exclusive content corpus ($31M in consulting data across 1,026+ businesses that has 'never been in any book'), brand recognition (Alex Hormozi is one of the most recognized business influencers globally), community integration (ACQ Vantage founders network of verified $1M+ entrepreneurs on Skool), platform lock-in (deep integration with acquisition.com ecosystem including books, playbooks, community, and advisory services).
competitive.meta_creator_ai_status: [uncertain] No evidence found of participation in Meta's Creator AI program for Instagram/Facebook/WhatsApp AI chatbot clones.
competitive.engagement_metrics_public: [uncertain] No publicly disclosed engagement metrics (MAU, messages per session, retention, NPS) found for ACQ AI specifically. ACQ Vantage marketing states ACQ AI is 'rated #1 by members' but no quantitative data provided.
